message.reasoning:
The user wants a simple HTML code for a product card with a beautiful style.
I need to provide a single file (or separate HTML/CSS blocks) that includes:
1.  HTML structure (image, title, price, description, button).
2.  CSS for styling (modern, clean, hover effects, shadows, responsive).
3.  Maybe a tiny bit of JS for interaction (like a "Add to cart" alert), but CSS-only is better for "simple".

reasoning_details.text:
The user wants a simple HTML code for a product card with a beautiful style.
I need to provide a single file (or separate HTML/CSS blocks) that includes:
1.  HTML structure (image, title, price, description, button).
2.  CSS for styling (modern, clean, hover effects, shadows, responsive).
3.  Maybe a tiny bit of JS for interaction (like a "Add to cart" alert), but CSS-only is better for "simple".
